name: enrique-personal-site
description: Browser-native AI knowledge site — ask questions, get answers grounded in published Markdown. No backend, no inference API.

scripts.prebuild: node scripts/build-index.mjs && node scripts/build-og.mjs && node scripts/build-favicon.mjs
scripts.dev: pnpm run index && pnpm run og && pnpm run favicon && astro dev
